commentary_links.english: You must not partake of it; you must pour it out on the ground like water:
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מכשיר שנאמר לא תאכלנו על הארץ

commentary_links.hebrew: וְהַבָּשָׂ֞ר אֲשֶׁר־יִגַּ֤ע בְּכׇל־טָמֵא֙ לֹ֣א יֵֽאָכֵ֔ל בָּאֵ֖שׁ יִשָּׂרֵ֑ף וְהַ֨בָּשָׂ֔ר כׇּל־טָה֖וֹר יֹאכַ֥ל בָּשָֽׂר׃
commentary_links.english: Flesh that touches anything impure shall not be eaten; it shall be consumed in fire. As for other flesh, only one who is pure may eat such flesh.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: עליה &star אלא מסיפא והבשר לרבות עצים

commentary_links.hebrew: מִכׇּל־הָאֹ֜כֶל אֲשֶׁ֣ר יֵאָכֵ֗ל אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָב֥וֹא עָלָ֛יו מַ֖יִם יִטְמָ֑א וְכׇל־מַשְׁקֶה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִשָּׁתֶ֔ה בְּכׇל־כְּלִ֖י יִטְמָֽא׃
commentary_links.english: As to any food that may be eaten, it shall become impure if it came in contact with water;eif it came in contact with water That is, if the food then came in contact with the carcass of any animal named in vv. 29–30. as to any liquid that may be drunk, it shall become impure if it was inside any vessel.fany vessel That is, one contaminated via contact with a carcass as in vv. 32–33.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: מנא לן אילימא מדכתיב והבשר אשר
